SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREGG, MEEGAN SCHOLER, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALISTRERI, SAL $1,175.29 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,260.29, DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO RETAIN $1836.71 OF PLAINTIFF'S $3,012.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT; THE BALANCE OF $1,175.29 OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IS TO BE REFUNDED TO THE PLAINTIFFS.
